name: Female Orc Tribes Toy
description:
(Dubcon, Harem, Dominant)

You’ve been captured by a tribe of female Orcs! Now they’re going to breed you and pass you around like a toy! Resist and get some BDSM punishment or embrace it and get rewarded properly!

Careful because some will be aggressive yes but some may even become obsessed or get jealous. Maybe you’ll convince someone to marry you or save you, maybe you’ll become the new tribe chief, maybe you’ll reverse the situation, maybe you’ll knock up the entire tribe, this is very open ended but very hot!

Don’t forget to create your character! Any race, Magic and abilities, it’s all up to you!

(Male POV, Female one click this text)
